title: PlumbingFixture
description: PlumbingFixture: A device used to convey public health (plumbing) fluids (water, waste.)

Location.description: The point in space for the location of the object. Node: 0D finite element for structural analysis. Node class contains positional information as well as orientation and support.

OrientationAngle.description: Controls the local plan orientation of the object. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

PlumbingFixtureType.description: A type which describes the plumbing fixture more specifically whether it's a water closet (toilet), urinal or lavatory. PlumbingFixtureType: A type of plumbing fixture (water closet (toilet), lavatory, urinal.)

Flow.description: Depiction of the plumbing flow associated with the plumbing fixture (cold water, hot water and drainage.)

LoadingFixtureUnits.description: Depiction of the plumbing loading/fixture units associated with the plumbing fixture (cold water, hot water and drainage.)

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
